title: thelaia occidentalis
intro: Thelaia occidentalis, a plant species native to the Americas, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Thelaia occidentalis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Thelaia occidentalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
